name: Annihilus
ability: On Reveal: Each of your cards randomly chooses a location to move to.

name: Black Knight
ability: When this is destroyed, draw a card.

name: Blink
ability: You can move this each turn. When it moves, +1 Power.

name: Blob
ability: Ongoing: Nothing can move this to another location.

name: Bullseye
ability: On Reveal: The next card you draw will be a 2-Cost card. (if any are left)

name: Elsa Bloodstone
ability: At the end of each turn, if you are winning this location, +1 Power.

name: Flatman
ability: Ongoing: Adjacent locations have +1 Power.

name: Ghost-Spider
ability: On Reveal: Move the last card you played here.

name: Goblin Queen
ability: On Reveal: Other cards can't be revealed this turn.

name: Gwenpool
ability: On Reveal: Double this card's Power.

name: Hit Monkey
ability: On Reveal: Gain +2 Power for each other card you played this turn.

name: J. Jonah Jameson
ability: Ongoing: Your emotes are ruder.

name: Jean Grey
ability: On Reveal: The next card your opponent plays must be played here, if possible.

name: Jeff the Baby Land Shark
ability: You can move this once. Nothing can stop you from moving or playing this to any location.

name: King Eitri
ability: On Reveal: Give the next card you play +4 Power.

name: Kitty Pryde
ability: You can return this to your hand to gain +2 Power.

name: Lady Deathstrike
ability: On Reveal: Destroy the enemy card with the highest Power at this location.

name: Legion
ability: On Reveal: Change other locations into this location.

name: Makkari
ability: When you draw this, place it at a random location.

name: Mephisto
ability: If you win this game, double your winnings.

name: Mirage
ability: As you play this, disguise it as Mister Fantastic. After the final turn, reveal it.

name: Ms. Marvel
ability: Ongoing: If this is your only card here, adjacent locations have +5 Power.

name: Nebula
ability: On Reveal: If your opponent played a card here this turn, x2 Power and put this in your hand.

name: Negasonic Teenage Warhead
ability: After ANY card is played here, destroy this card AND that card.

name: Night Nurse
ability: On Reveal: Add all cards you discarded or destroyed last turn to your hand.

name: Random
ability: On Reveal: Set this card's Power equal to the Power of a random card in your deck.

name: Red Guardian
ability: On Reveal: You must play a card here next turn.

name: Silk
ability: After ANY card is played here, this moves to another location.

name: Silver Sable
ability: You can only play this at a location where you have 6+ total Power.

name: Silver Samurai
ability: When this is discarded from your hand, draw a card.

name: Snowguard
ability: While in your hand, this transforms each turn into a Hawk or a Bear.

name: Stegron
ability: On Reveal: Move an enemy card from here to another location.

name: Stryfe
ability: If your opponent has 12+ Power here at the end of any turn, destroy this.

name: Surtur
ability: If you move the Human Torch to this location, +10 Power.

name: The Living Tribunal
ability: At the end of the game, split your total Power evenly among all Locations.

name: The Phoenix Force
ability: On Reveal: Revive one of your destroyed cards with +5 Power. If it's {card.Card_Modified.Name}, +10 Power.

name: Toad
ability: On Reveal: Move the last card you played to this location.

name: Uncle Ben
ability: When this card is destroyed, add Spider-Man to your hand.

name: Viv Vision
ability: When you move a card to a location, move this card there as well.

name: War Machine
ability: Ongoing: Your 1-Cost cards have +1 Power.

name: Witchfire
ability: On Reveal: Your opponent draws a card, increase its cost by 1.

name: X-23
ability: When this is discarded from your hand, put it back. It costs 0.

name: Yo-Yo
ability: When this card moves, move it back with +1 Power.
